contextBlurb: Colorado has no dedicated stablecoin statute but permits stablecoins to operate under its money transmission and fintech regulatory framework. HB25-1201 (2025) advances Colorado's fintech oversight, allowing compliant stablecoin businesses to operate within existing financial regulation.

legislation.title: Money Transmission and Fintech Regulatory Framework
legislation.summary: Advances Colorado's fintech regulatory framework, including provisions applicable to digital asset and stablecoin businesses operating under money transmission rules. No dedicated stablecoin statute; compliant stablecoins may operate under the existing framework.
